---
pagetitle: "The AI Engineering Blueprint"
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Hero ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hero-section {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0a0f 0%, #12121a 100%);
  padding: 5rem 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  color: #e8e8f0;
  border-radius: 0 0 32px 32px;
  margin-top: -1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #2a2a3a;
}
.hero-section h1 {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 3.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}
.hero-section h1 em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: #6366f1;
}
.hero-subtitle {
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  color: #9090a0;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  max-width: 800px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.hero-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.15);
  border: 1px solid rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.3);
  color: #818cf8;
  padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.hero-cta {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-top: 2.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.hero-cta a {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.875rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 10px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  font-size: 1rem;
}
.btn-primary-hero {
  background: #6366f1;
  color: white !important;
}
.btn-primary-hero:hover {
  background: #818cf8;
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.4);
}
.btn-secondary-hero {
  border: 2px solid #3a3a4a;
  color: #e8e8f0 !important;
}
.btn-secondary-hero:hover {
  border-color: #6366f1;
  color: #818cf8 !important;
}

/* ── Content Container ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.hub-content {
  max-width: 1100px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 1.5rem 5rem;
}

/* ── Philosophy Section ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.philosophy {
  max-width: 900px;
  margin: 4rem auto;
  padding: 0 1.5rem;
}
.philosophy h2 {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 2.25rem;
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.philosophy p {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
  color: #4a5568;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

/* ── Pillar Grid ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pillar-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin: 3rem 0;
}
.pillar {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
  background: #f8fafc;
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.pillar:hover {
  border-color: #6366f1;
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.1);
}
.pillar-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
.pillar h3 { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; font-size: 1.1rem; }
.pillar p { font-size: 0.9rem; color: #64748b; margin: 0; }

/* ── What's in the Box ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.box-section {
  margin: 4rem 0;
}
.box-section h2 {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.box-section .section-sub {
  text-align: center;
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}
.box-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.5rem;
}
@media (max-width: 500px) {
  .box-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
.box-card {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e9ecef;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 2rem;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.box-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 4px;
}
.box-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}
.box-card.accent-indigo::before { background: #6366f1; }
.box-card.accent-green::before { background: #22c55e; }
.box-card.accent-amber::before { background: #f59e0b; }
.box-card.accent-rose::before { background: #f43f5e; }
.box-card.accent-cyan::before { background: #06b6d4; }
.box-card.accent-purple::before { background: #a855f7; }
.box-card .card-icon {
  font-size: 1.8rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.box-card h3 {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0;
}
.box-card p {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: #64748b;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
}
.box-card .card-list {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #64748b;
}
.box-card .card-list li {
  padding: 0.25rem 0;
  padding-left: 1.2rem;
  position: relative;
}
.box-card .card-list li::before {
  content: '\2713';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  color: #22c55e;
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* ── Semester Cards ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.semester-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(400px, 1fr));
  gap: 2rem;
  margin: 3rem 0;
}
@media (max-width: 500px) {
  .semester-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
.semester-card {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e9ecef;
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 3rem;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.semester-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-6px);
  box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.12);
  border-color: #6366f1;
}
.semester-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; width: 6px; height: 100%;
  background: #6366f1;
}
.semester-card .tag {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: #6366f1;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  display: block;
}
.semester-card h3 {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem 0;
}
.semester-card p {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: #5a6369;
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.semester-card .week-preview {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #94a3b8;
  border-top: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  padding-top: 1rem;
  margin: 0;
}
.btn-outline {
  display: inline-block;
  border: 2px solid #6366f1;
  color: #6366f1;
  padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  text-decoration: none;
}

/* ── Numbers Bar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.numbers-bar {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(120px, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin: 3rem 0;
  text-align: center;
}
.number-item .big {
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 2.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #6366f1;
  display: block;
}
.number-item .label {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #64748b;
}

/* ── CTA Banner ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cta-banner {
  background: #0a0a0f;
  color: white;
  border-radius: 24px;
  padding: 4rem;
  text-align: center;
  border: 1px solid #2a2a3a;
  margin-top: 4rem;
}
.cta-banner h2 {
  color: white;
  margin-top: 0;
  font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
  font-size: 2.25rem;
}
.cta-banner p { font-size: 1.15rem; opacity: 0.8; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
.btn-indigo {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #6366f1;
  color: white !important;
  padding: 0.875rem 2.5rem;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  margin: 0 0.5rem;
}
.btn-indigo:hover {
  background: #818cf8;
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.4);
}
.btn-ghost {
  display: inline-block;
  border: 2px solid #3a3a4a;
  color: #e8e8f0 !important;
  padding: 0.875rem 2.5rem;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  margin: 0 0.5rem;
}
.btn-ghost:hover {
  border-color: #6366f1;
  color: #818cf8 !important;
}
</style>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- HERO -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-badge">Course in a Box</div>
  <h1>The AI Engineering <em>Blueprint</em></h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">Everything you need to teach a world-class AI Systems course. Textbook, framework, labs, hardware kits, syllabi, and assessment — ready to deploy.</p>
  <div class="hero-cta">
    <a href="getting-started.qmd" class="btn-primary-hero">Get Started</a>
    <a href="foundations-syllabus.qmd" class="btn-secondary-hero">View the Syllabus</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="hub-content">

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- PHILOSOPHY -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="philosophy">
  <h2>The Goal: Silicon Realism</h2>
  <p>Most ML courses stop at the model. This course starts there. Our goal is to teach students to think at the intersection of <strong>silicon physics</strong> and <strong>algorithmic logic</strong> — to understand <em>why</em> a system is slow, not just <em>that</em> it is slow.</p>
  <p>The Blueprint provides everything an instructor needs: a mathematically rigorous textbook, a build-from-scratch framework, interactive simulations, physical hardware labs, week-by-week schedules, and a complete assessment system.</p>

  <div class="pillar-grid">
    <div class="pillar">
      <div class="pillar-icon">&#x1F4D6;</div>
      <h3>Read</h3>
      <p>Two-volume textbook with quantitative rigor</p>
    </div>
    <div class="pillar">
      <div class="pillar-icon">&#x1F525;</div>
      <h3>Build</h3>
      <p>TinyTorch: 20-module ML framework from scratch</p>
    </div>
    <div class="pillar">
      <div class="pillar-icon">&#x1F52C;</div>
      <h3>Explore</h3>
      <p>Interactive labs with simulated silicon physics</p>
    </div>
    <div class="pillar">
      <div class="pillar-icon">&#x1F527;</div>
      <h3>Deploy</h3>
      <p>Hardware kits: Arduino, Raspberry Pi, Seeed</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- BY THE NUMBERS -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="numbers-bar">
  <div class="number-item">
    <span class="big">2</span>
    <span class="label">Volumes</span>
  </div>
  <div class="number-item">
    <span class="big">33</span>
    <span class="label">Chapters</span>
  </div>
  <div class="number-item">
    <span class="big">20</span>
    <span class="label">TinyTorch Modules</span>
  </div>
  <div class="number-item">
    <span class="big">32</span>
    <span class="label">Interactive Labs</span>
  </div>
  <div class="number-item">
    <span class="big">3</span>
    <span class="label">Hardware Kits</span>
  </div>
  <div class="number-item">
    <span class="big">600+</span>
    <span class="label">Auto-Graded Tests</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- SEMESTER CARDS (above the box — most actionable content first) -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="box-section">
  <h2>Two Semesters, One Discipline</h2>
  <p class="section-sub">Each semester is self-contained. Teach one or both.</p>

  <div class="semester-grid">
    <a href="foundations-syllabus.qmd" class="semester-card">
      <span class="tag">Semester 1 &middot; Volume I</span>
      <h3>AI Systems Foundations</h3>
      <p>From one machine to eight accelerators. Students build an ML framework from scratch and learn the Iron Law of hardware-software co-design.</p>
      <p class="week-preview">
        Weeks 1-4: Physics of AI &middot; Weeks 5-8: Building the Stack &middot;
        Weeks 9-12: Optimization &middot; Weeks 13-16: Production & Capstone
      </p>
      <div class="btn-outline">View Full Syllabus &rarr;</div>
    </a>

    <a href="scale-syllabus.qmd" class="semester-card">
      <span class="tag">Semester 2 &middot; Volume II</span>
      <h3>AI Engineering at Scale</h3>
      <p>From one node to ten thousand. Students master distributed training, collective communication, and the infrastructure of frontier model fleets.</p>
      <p class="week-preview">
        Weeks 1-4: The Fleet &middot; Weeks 5-8: Distributed Algorithms &middot;
        Weeks 9-12: Deployment &middot; Weeks 13-16: Governance & Capstone
      </p>
      <div class="btn-outline">View Full Syllabus &rarr;</div>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- WHAT'S IN THE BOX -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="box-section">
  <h2>What's in the Box</h2>
  <p class="section-sub">Six integrated components. One coherent curriculum.</p>

  <div class="box-grid">
    <div class="box-card accent-indigo">
      <div class="card-icon">&#x1F4D6;</div>
      <h3>The Textbook</h3>
      <p>Two volumes following the Hennessy & Patterson model — from single-machine foundations to distributed fleets.</p>
      <ul class="card-list">
        <li>Volume I: 16 chapters (1-8 GPUs)</li>
        <li>Volume II: 17 chapters (distributed scale)</li>
        <li>Appendices, glossaries, notation guides</li>
        <li>HTML, PDF, and EPUB formats</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="box-card accent-green">
      <div class="card-icon">&#x1F525;</div>
      <h3>TinyTorch</h3>
      <p>Students implement a complete deep learning framework from scratch — tensors to transformers to production optimization.</p>
      <ul class="card-list">
        <li>20 progressive modules (100+ hrs)</li>
        <li>600+ auto-graded test cases</li>
        <li>6 historical milestones (1958-2018)</li>
        <li>NBGrader-compatible notebooks</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="box-card accent-amber">
      <div class="card-icon">&#x1F52C;</div>
      <h3>Interactive Labs</h3>
      <p>Marimo-based simulations powered by mlsysim — students manipulate silicon physics with instant visual feedback.</p>
      <ul class="card-list">
        <li>16 Vol I labs + 16 Vol II labs</li>
        <li>Prediction Locks for active learning</li>
        <li>3-part structure (Calibrate, Integrate, Design)</li>
        <li>Browser-based, zero-install</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="box-card accent-rose">
      <div class="card-icon">&#x1F527;</div>
      <h3>Hardware Kits</h3>
      <p>Physical deployment labs on real edge devices — the tangible bridge between theory and silicon.</p>
      <ul class="card-list">
        <li>Arduino Nano 33 BLE Sense</li>
        <li>Raspberry Pi (with accelerator)</li>
        <li>Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32S3</li>
        <li>Pre-built deployment guides</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="box-card accent-cyan">
      <div class="card-icon">&#x1F4CA;</div>
      <h3>Assessment System</h3>
      <p>Three-tier grading framework: auto-graded code, systems thinking via Decision Logs, and open-ended Design Challenges.</p>
      <ul class="card-list">
        <li>Rubrics for every assignment type</li>
        <li>Decision Log grading criteria</li>
        <li>AI Olympics capstone specification</li>
        <li>Volume II: TCO audits, carbon budgets</li>
      </ul>
    </div>

    <div class="box-card accent-purple">
      <div class="card-icon">&#x1F4C5;</div>
      <h3>Ready-Made Syllabi</h3>
      <p>Week-by-week schedules for two semesters. Every reading, lab, and assignment pre-mapped and sequenced.</p>
      <ul class="card-list">
        <li>16-week Foundations syllabus</li>
        <li>16-week Scale syllabus</li>
        <li>Customization guide for your context</li>
        <li>TA training and grading guides</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- CTA -->
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="cta-banner">
  <h2>Ready to teach?</h2>
  <p>Download the full curriculum and start building your course today.<br>Everything is open-source under CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0.</p>
  <a href="getting-started.qmd" class="btn-indigo">Get Started</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions" class="btn-ghost">Join the Community</a>
</div>

</div>
```
